project-ai/project_ai_health.description: Read the gateway's public liveness state (GET /health/live)

project-ai/project_ai_instance.description: Read the public instance identity and authority boundary (GET /api/v1/instance)

project-ai/project_ai_dashboard.description: Read the public aggregated evidence dashboard (GET /api/v1/dashboard)

project-ai/project_ai_dois.description: Read the public DOI-backed publication registry (GET /dois)

project-ai/project_ai_replay_status.description: Read the canonical replay invariant status (GET /replay/status)

project-ai/project_ai_atlas_status.description: Read the public Atlas analysis-only status (GET /atlas/status)

project-ai/project_ai_audit_query.description: Query the verified append-only audit chain (GET /audit; machine bearer)

project-ai/project_ai_record_verdict.description: Relay one canonical verdict as audit evidence, not a governance evaluation (POST /chimera/verdict; machine bearer)

project-ai/project_ai_atlas_sludge_gener.description: Generate a watermarked fictional Sludge narrative (POST /atlas/sludge; machine bearer)

project-ai/project_ai_atlas_sludge_list.description: List verified Sludge generation metadata; bodies are never persisted (GET /api/v1/modules/atlas/sludge; machine bearer)
